dict.string: Dockwright needs microphone access for voice input and dictation.
Dockwright uses speech recognition for voice-to-text transcription.
Dockwright needs calendar access to read and create events.
Dockwright needs calendar access to read and create events.
Dockwright needs reminders access to read and create reminders.
Dockwright needs reminders access to read and create reminders.
Dockwright needs contacts access to search and display contact information.
Dockwright uses AppleScript to read browser tabs and control apps.
Dockwright needs screen recording access for screenshots and screen OCR.
Dockwright needs camera access to take photos for analysis.
